intent_summary: Phase 5.8 case_001: align rule-5 docstring in src/oida_code/operator_soak/aggregate.py with the QA/A35 sec.5.8-F tightening so the prose matches the implementation (rules 3 and 4 short-circuit before rule 5; reaching rule 5 implicitly requires false_positive_count<2 AND false_negative_count<2). Behavior is unchanged.

evidence_items.summary: Single-commit docstring update on branch operator-soak/case-001-docstring-v2 (commit ddf302ab53c1291551194dd93e1778fec4a0ba9a, cherry-picked from operator-soak/case-001-docstring's 6585dd4 onto current main so the branch's tests/ stay in sync with main's models). The change touches only the module docstring of src/oida_code/operator_soak/aggregate.py; no executable code, no test, no schema, no public API was modified.

Operator intent recorded in operator_soak_cases/case_001_oida_code_self/README.md: low-risk operator-readable docstring fix selected so the operator (cgpro) can pre-state the expected outcome (gateway diagnostic_only, no contract violations) before reading the artefacts.
